biological_replicate: C57BL/6J male mice were fed either a low or very high fat diet for 13 weeks.
technical_replicate: mice were injected intraperitoneally, daily, with vehicle, rosiglitazone (Rosi), or TPhP (10 mg/kg).
experimental_design: diet comparison (low fat vs high fat) and treatment comparison (Rosi vs TPhP)
We tested the hypothesis that TPhP is a selective PPARγ ligand, which fails to induce brite adipogenesis.
factor_value: diet (low fat, high fat), treatment (Rosi, TPhP)
C57BL/6J male mice were fed either a low or very high fat diet.
